Book direct and you pay exactly what we quote — no agents, no booking fees, no resort surcharge.

📍 Oceans View · Victoria Road, Camps Bay · 33°57′S 18°22′E
Good to know

Frequently asked

What are check-in and check-out times?

Check-in is from 2pm and check-out is by 11am. Arriving early or leaving late? Tell us — we'll store your bags and you can use the pool and beach either side of your stay.

Is parking included?

Yes — secure on-site parking and fast Wi-Fi are free for every guest, on every rate. We can also arrange an airport transfer; just send your flight details.

What's included in the rate?

Breakfast for everyone in the room, full use of the pools, beach, gym and the spa's sauna, plus Wi-Fi and parking. Spa treatments and dinner are extra — and there's never a booking fee or resort surcharge.

Are children welcome?

Very. There's a shallow pool just for little ones, kids' menus in both restaurants, and cots and high chairs on request. Under-fives stay and eat breakfast free.

What's your cancellation policy?

Free cancellation up to 48 hours before arrival on every direct booking, with a full refund. Because you book straight with us, there are no agency fees layered on top.

Oceans View

A bright beachfront resort on the sand at Camps Bay, Cape Town. Sea-view rooms, three pools, a spa, and a slower way to do summer.
